list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:11px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:36px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:47px left ; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:11px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:36px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:47px left ;
li.text: 确保机床及其周围照明条件充足。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:36px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:47px left ; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:36px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:47px left ;
li.text: 在任何时候都需确保机床及其周围整洁有序。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:36px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:47px left ; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:36px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:47px left ;
li.text: 清理机床周边的油渍，切削液及散落的碎屑。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:36px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:47px left ; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:36px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:47px left ;
li.text: 在高处执行工作时，请使用稳定的脚凳或梯子。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:36px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:47px left ; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:36px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:47px left ;
li.text: 所有易燃物品须远离工作区域。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:36px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:47px left ; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:47px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-before:always; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:47px left ;
